default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy, Web3.0 migration, and competitive response.](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New "Education" Hub:** Create a separate `/education` hub for high-volume, SEO-focused content. This protects the main blog's brand while enabling rapid, strategic publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [**Web3.0 Migration Plan:** The hub's launch is post-Web3.0 (March 12). During the Feb 6–March 12 content freeze, content will be front-loaded, tagged for migration, and published sparingly.](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
  - [**Competitive Content:** Counter Sublime Security's aggressive brand bidding (now \>50% of Abnormal's brand impressions) with a direct "Abnormal vs. Sublime" page designed for LLM citation.](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1926.0)
  - [**Mid-Funnel CTAs:** Educational content will use mid-funnel CTAs (e.g., white papers) to better match user intent, moving away from high-friction demo requests.](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1611.0)

## Topics

### New Content Strategy: "Education" Hub

  - [**Problem:** High-volume, SEO-driven content risks diluting the main blog's brand and creating a bottleneck for the internal team.](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [**Solution:** Create a separate `/education` hub on the Abnormal site.](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Rapidly publish high-volume, educational content on broad cybersecurity topics.](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
      - [**Audience:** Primarily search engines and LLMs for citation, not human readers.](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
      - [**Goal:** Establish Abnormal as a citation source across many keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [**Execution:**](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
      - [**Ownership:** GrowthX will manage content production and publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
      - [**Structure:** Mimic the blog's functionality (topic grouping, date filters).](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
      - [**Content:** Agnostic, non-promotional, and LLM-friendly (e.g., "Too Long to Read" summaries, FAQs).](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)

### Web3.0 Migration & Content Freeze

  - [**Constraint:** The new hub's launch is dependent on the Web3.0 site redesign.](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [**Timeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)
      - [**Content Freeze:** Feb 6 – March 12](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)
      - [**Web3.0 Go-Live:** March 12](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)
      - [**Post-Launch:** A 4–6 week stabilization period is expected.](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**Migration Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)
      - [**New Content:** Front-load publishing before the freeze. During the freeze, publish only essential content and use the new CMS for scheduling.](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
      - [**Existing Content:** Tag relevant posts for migration to the new hub.](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [**SEO Preservation:** Prioritize preserving SEO value, especially for the top 20% of posts by traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1079.0)
  - [**Execution:**](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
      - [**Tagging:** Emily will create a new blog tag/category for educational content.](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
      - [**Guidelines:** Emily will create a template for the new content style (agnostic tone, LLM-friendly structure).](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1557.0)

### Competitive Response: Sublime Security

  - [**Problem:** Sublime Security's aggressive brand bidding has increased its share of Abnormal's brand impressions from 10% to \>50% in the last month.](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=2342.0)
  - [**Solution:** Create an "Abnormal vs. Sublime" page to counter the narrative and capture search demand.](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1926.0)
  - [**Execution:**](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
      - [**Format:** Model the page after Sublime's own LLM-optimized comparison page.](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=2200.0)
      - [**Content:** Position Abnormal as the first choice, citing awards (Gartner, Voice Awards) and using neutral, paraphrased G2 data for competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=2266.0)
      - [**Review:** This content requires internal review due to past legal directives. The new directive from leadership is to be more aggressive ("publish and get our hands slapped").](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=2060.0)
      - [**Placement:** This page will reside in the new `/education` hub.](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=2024.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Warren & Abdallah:**](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
      - [Contact Sharon Rook to propose the `/education` hub as a post-Web3.0 project.](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [**Emily:**](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
      - [Create a new blog tag/category for educational content.](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
      - [Develop a content template for the new style.](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1557.0)
      - [Share the "Abnormal vs. Proofpoint" page example.](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1960.0)
  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)
      - [Schedule a recurring bi-weekly call with Meaghan and Warren to align on migration.](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
      - [Queue the "Abnormal vs. Sublime" page for immediate production.](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=2463.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=2463.0)
      - [Begin drafting the "Abnormal vs. Sublime" page.](https://fathom.video/share/Qxd8LvwWAGPrf8fPnuevwQ_hqUsefVU6?tab=summary&timestamp=2463.0)

Email Sharon Rook re: Education Hub project plan; propose post-Web 3.0 launch

Email Meaghan + Sharon: essential freeze-period posts
Create Education tag; retroactively tag; share w/ Jo; apply to new posts
Draft Education Hub template; share w/ Jo + GrowthX
Email Warren: Abnormal vs Proofpoint page link
Queue Sublime vs Abnormal article; route via Legal GPT; publish
